entity.name: Ryan Madhuwala
entity.description: Creator of Caracal and CEO of Garudex Labs.

projects.name: Caracal
projects.description: Caracal is an open-source authority, delegation, and identity platform for autonomous AI agents. It provides execution authority, policy enforcement, delegation management, auditability, and secure access control for agentic systems.

channels.description: Support ongoing development and sustainability of Caracal Open Source.

plans.name: GitHub Sponsors
plans.description: Recurring sponsorship for sustained Caracal maintenance, releases, documentation, and infrastructure.

plans.name: GitHub Sponsors One-Time
plans.description: One-time sponsorship for targeted Caracal development, issue triage, and community support.
